channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumping, 4th May
item.description:
Please remove a dumped large paint tin been there for a month
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste, 4th May
item.description:
Garden waste outside of the back gate of no 31 rookery gardens, st Mary cray

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped items on waste chute, 4th May
item.description:
Items dumped that are too big to go into the waste chutes.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Welby Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekly flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
Continual flytipping. It's been ripped open by foxes so is strewn everywhere. This week there is even a whole bed. It looks an absolute mess and makes the area look awful.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellenborough Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins and fly tipping on estate - Rowley Gardens, 4th May
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rowley Gardens, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New set of flytipped rubbish, 4th May
item.description:
There is more flytipped rubbish here. Different items to last week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Inglis Street, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture fly tipped, 4th May
item.description:
Cabinet dumped outside Broadside Close on the Blackheath Standard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic waste dumped outside flats, 4th May
item.description:
Waste is dumped here nearly every day and the foxes spread it everywhere.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Further furniture added to street, 4th May
item.description:
More rubbish has been added to the flytipping pile since reported

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coll's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on side wall of Shapes Barber shop 306 Brixton road SW9 6AE. The graffiti is on the lower section in black spray paint., 4th May
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed on the side wall of Shapes Barber shop 306 Brixton road SW9 6AE. The graffiti is on the lower section of wall. It has been there for approximately two weeks. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 308,310,312, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bins are overflowing again, 4th May
item.description:
Every weekend these bins are overflowing with rubbish. Now there is flipping on the other side of the road too. There’s bins near regular emptying please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Manor Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch and pallet, 4th May
item.description:
Can you please clear these away? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Parade, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th May
item.description:
Usual flytipping spot, a camera here would be a good deterrent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linden Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unlawful parking, 4th May
item.description:
These residents of Moore Road constantly drive round the green the wrong way to park outside their homes. the street is 2 way but the green is one way, yet whenever they are pulled up on it they get aggressive and shout. they have to cross the chevrons (which according to the highway code you should not cross) to get that side of the road..we also have the issue of amazon / dpd etc driving the wrong side to get to the house number they need. One day there is going to be a bad head on accident if nothing is done. we need No entry signs, no entry across the road and any other means necessary to prevent this happening

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Moore Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post trolley chained to lamp post, 4th May
item.description:
This has been chained to this lamp post for months. I wonder if there is any undelivered mail inside.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Coton Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bench falling apart on terrace at South Hill Wood, 4th May
item.description:
This well used bench is rotten and not structurally safe, falling apart at the sides and base. The screws are exposed and slats are falling off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tootswood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large caravan trailer abandoned, 4th May
item.description:
Caravan trailer has been dumped on betterton drive, jct davenport. Trailer causing obstruction to vehicles when turning left from davenport rd. Needs to be removed as an accident is likely to happen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81A, Davenport Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside of 12 Mornington Crescent, 4th May
item.description:
Visible damage to the pavement, specifically a large sink hole that has emerged. Water is penetrating and causing damage to the living areas below.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12a, Mornington Crescent, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter & detritus, 4th May
item.description:
Litter along pavement in various places on Old Perry Street and also does not look like road has been cleared of detritus for some time in several places.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin has been set on fire, 4th May
item.description:
Please can you clear the burnt debris and replace the bin? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Centre Common Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
